context.summary: Proof 033 teacher seasoning lesson P033-ROT-002 for SUPPORTED_ROTATION.

task: SEASON mechanism lesson into the pond. Mechanism=SUPPORTED_ROTATION. Domain=camera_gimbal. Observations=gimbal ring circles on a yoke; the moving part depends on the side pivot; grit creates drag; image sweep becomes jerky. Causal chain=A part must rotate or circle.; A support interface holds the rotating motion.; Friction or abrasion rises at the support.; Motion becomes rough, slow, stuck, or stopped.. Consequence signature=rough motion appears; drag rises; rotation degrades or stops. Return bounded motifs and lineage only.
